camera: slow stalking tracking shot with lens-close movement and compressed framing, kinetic editorial motion and hard rhythmic movement
lighting: low-key practical lighting with selective pools of glow in heavy atmosphere, wet reflective highlights and backlit surface sheen, heavy atmospheric haze with volumetric depth, motivated practicals and visible glow sources, deep shadow falloff and noir contrast
palette: midnight blue, deep crimson, and silver highlights, mirror-like chrome reflections, polished premium finish, warm amber highlights, cool cyan accents
